title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Flipkart Books

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Flipkart Books
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!
